report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Impermanent Loss & Liquidity Providing (973 lines) and Hyperliquid Perp DEX Trading (1004 lines), with full SEO metadata, structured data, and page data files.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Impermanent Loss: IL formula (2sqrt(d)/(1+d) - 1), 2x price move = 5.7% loss vs HODL, concentrated liquidity amplifies both fees and IL, Uniswap V4 introducing IL insurance pools, 67% of V3 LPs underwater in volatile pairs

Hyperliquid Protocol: #1 perp DEX by open interest (70%+ market share), $4.9B TVL, $9B+ daily volume, 314K monthly active users, $4.17T cumulative volume, HYPE token at ~$35 (#16 CoinGecko, $8.4B market cap), 97% of fees fund buybacks, staking tiers for fee discounts, Android app MVP launched Apr 1 2026

sections.title: Content Created
items: Impermanent Loss & Liquidity Providing Guide 2026 — 8 sections covering IL mechanics, constant product formula, math tables (IL at 1.25x-10x price changes), concentrated liquidity risks, 6 mitigation strategies, profitability analysis, tracking tools, 6 FAQs

Hyperliquid Perp DEX Trading Guide 2026 — 8 sections covering HyperBFT consensus, Hypercore order book (200K TPS), trading mechanics (150+ markets, 50x leverage, zero spot fees), HYPE tokenomics (1B supply, staking tiers), HyperEVM ecosystem, key metrics, risks (JELLY incident, centralization), 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Impermanent Loss: title 'Impermanent Loss & Liquidity Providing Guide 2026 | degen0x', target keyword 'impermanent loss liquidity providing guide 2026', schemas [Article, FAQPage], 5 internal links, OG article metadata

Hyperliquid: title 'Hyperliquid Guide 2026 — Perp DEX Trading & HYPE Token | degen0x', target keyword 'hyperliquid guide 2026 perp dex hype token', schemas [Article, FAQPage], 5 internal links, OG article metadata

sections.title: Data Files Created
items: src/data/pages/learn-20260403-v3.ts — PageData exports for both pages with full SEO config, tags, TOC, and internal links

report.notes: No interactive components created this cycle — both pages are comprehensive static learn guides following existing architecture. An IL calculator component could be a future enhancement for the impermanent loss page.
